html:
THE VENDETTA GAZETTE

Special Edition • April 27, 2026 • "All the Blood That's Fit to Print"

TRUMP'S GOLDEN RAMPAGE ENTERS SECOND WEEK!

Platinum Pompadour Pulverizes Poor Lakhhe SIX TIMES!

Holy mackerel and suffering saints! Just when the blood-soaked streets of Vendetta City thought they'd seen the worst of Donald Trump's golden reign of terror, our platinum-plated prince of destruction has outdone his own legendary savagery! This week, the golden gladiator seized another 43 fresh territories while conducting a mind-boggling 32 separate raids that left rival bosses weeping into their bootleg whiskey!

But here's the real jaw-dropper that'll make your grandmother reach for her rosary beads – Trump turned the already-battered Lakhhe into his personal punching bag, storming that poor sap's headquarters not once, not twice, but SIX SEPARATE TIMES in a single week! April 21st, 22nd, 24th, and a triple-header on the 25th that would make Babe Ruth jealous! By week's end, Lakhhe had been completely eliminated from the game, his 28-turf empire scattered to the four winds like leaves in a Chicago gale!

The systematic destruction reached its bloody crescendo when Trump also obliterated the mysterious 404 on April 26th, proving that no hideout, no matter how cleverly numbered, can escape the golden avalanche of vengeance!

WU-TANG ROARS BACK WITH ORIENTAL FURY!

The Iron Fist of the East Side has shown he's far from ready for the old gangsters' home! Wu-Tang exploded back into prominence this week with 27 fresh territorial conquests and an impressive 27 raids that reminded every mug in the city why they call him the Oriental Overlord!

Not content with mere expansion, Wu-Tang personally eliminated Grenber with a devastating headquarters assault on April 24th, while continuing his methodical dismantling of rival operations across the East Side. The old dragon still breathes fire, and his enemies are learning that lesson the hard way!

COKRO'S METEORIC RISE CONTINUES!

That smooth-talking sensation Cokro proved last week's spectacular showing was no fluke, claiming another 21 territories this week to cement his position among the city's most feared operators. While other bosses trade headquarters like baseball cards, Cokro has been quietly building his empire through calculated expansion and shrewd territorial acquisition!

SPECIAL BULLETIN: THE WEEK'S MOST SHOCKING UPSET!
Citizens, prepare yourselves for this earth-shaking revelation! In the most audacious display of brass-plated gall witnessed this decade, the rising star chiavenna had the unmitigated nerve to raid none other than Donald Trump himself – and walked away with a king's ransom of $500 cash, 500 weapons, and enough XP to make a veteran weep! The golden gladiator, accustomed to being the hunter rather than the hunted, discovered that even apex predators can become prey when they least expect it!

EMPIRE COLLAPSES AND NEW BLOOD RISES!

The merciless machinery of Vendetta City claimed six more victims this week, with jhackie, 404, Grenber, URAL📀, GANGSTAR, and the aforementioned Lakhhe all vanishing into the criminal afterlife. Meanwhile, fresh meat arrived in the form of Fyh, who immediately claimed a single turf and began what every boss hopes will be a meteoric rise to power!

FIFTH BLOOD EMPEROR suffered a devastating 24-turf hemorrhage this week, while Way6444 watched helplessly as 7 of his territories fell to hungrier predators. In this concrete jungle, there's no mercy for the weak or the slow!

POLICE BLOTTER

• Officers report finding a confused tourist asking directions to "404's headquarters" – apparently nobody told him the joint don't exist no more!

• Local speakeasy owner claims Wu-Tang's boys left such a generous tip after their celebration dinner, he's considering retirement to Florida.

• Three separate witnesses swear they saw Trump counting his winnings while humming "My Way" – though sources close to the golden gladiator insist he prefers "Brother, Can You Spare a Dime?"
